findings.description: Two commits with vague subject 'Address Copilot review comments'. Should be squashed or renamed to describe the actual change.
Auto-redirect useEffect with sessionStorage loop-prevention has no Vitest test. A test mocking window.location and verifying the storageKey guard would close the gap flagged in the previous review.
useState(i18n.language || 'en') change is unrelated to OIDC auto-login. Deserves its own commit or PR with a clear justification.
Date() as cache-buster produces a locale string. new Date().toISOString() would be more conventional and URL-safe.
